hints.text: Plates long white w/ a **maroon strip on the left**; trucks = black square plates, police = blue
White pickup, usually blurred with only the **antenna on the left** + a sliver of car visible; rusty clips on the crossbar
Predominantly **desert** — flat arid sand as far as you can see, little greenery
Roads = solid outer white lines w/ white or yellow middle (rarely outer yellow too)
**Round poles, 3 insulators** (middle one slightly higher) + two diagonal bars connecting the crossbar to the pole
Chevrons **white-on-red & white-on-blue**; lots of 2022 **World Cup** banners still up
Crossing signs feature a **man in a thobe**
Well covered (S/W lack it); **numbered zones on street signs** = region; antenna length = region (short = north, long = Doha/SW); stadiums (Lusail golden bowl, Al Bayt stripes)
